A

actor() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the actor record component.
actor() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the actor that initiated the transaction (player UUID, CONSOLE, SYSTEM).
addBalance(String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.EconomyRepository
Adds an amount to a player's balance (may be negative).
ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.MoneySource
Admin-created changes such as /eco give, /eco take, /eco set.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the positive amount moved in this transaction.

Command executor for /bal and /balance.

Creates a balance command executor.
burn(String, long, MoneySource, String, String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.TransactionManager
Burns currency from a player's account (removes money).

Removes all registered listeners.

Returns the loaded config.yml.

Convenience accessor for the loaded config.yml.

Loads and exposes Realm configuration files.

Creates a new configuration manager for the given plugin.
connect() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.DatabaseManager
Opens the database connection and initializes schema/migrations.
Core - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.core
Main entry point for the Realm plugin.

Manages the Realm SQLite database connection and schema.

Creates a database manager bound to the given plugin (for data folder access).

Logs a debug message if debug: true is enabled in config.yml.
deposit(String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.EconomyManager

Disables the module and releases any resources registered in Module.enable().

Represents a feature module that can be enabled/disabled/reloaded by the core plugin.

Returns the value of the reference record component.
reference() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.LedgerRecordedEvent

Reloads module configuration/state without restarting the server.
reload() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.EconomyModule

Reloads Realm configuration and re-applies any runtime settings.

S

Sets a player's balance to an exact value.
